---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? (e.g., "The agent can't handle Workday's date picker")

## Proposed solution
How would you like this to work?

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought of.

## Additional context
- Does this affect a specific ATS platform?
- Is this Sweden-specific or applicable to other countries?
- Would you be willing to submit a PR for this?
